description: Task progression tracker for git-story. One task per day via cron job.

tasks.title: Initialize Python project (pyproject, Click CLI skeleton, packaging)
Implement git range parsing and commit/diff extraction via gitpython
Config layering (CLI flags > env > toml > defaults) + auth error handling
Handle edge cases: empty ranges, merge commits, invalid revs
Define LLMBackend abstract interface
Implement OpenAI backend adapter (JSON mode)
Preprocessor: diff normalization, truncation, token budgeting
Design and iterate semantic grouping prompt
Parse and validate LLM structured output against JSON schema
Map-reduce chunking for large commit ranges
Define canonical JSON output schema
Markdown renderer (plain-markdown style)
Conventional-commit style renderer
JSON output emission to stdout/file
Implement --style and --output flags
Add Anthropic backend adapter
Add Ollama (local) backend adapter
Error handling, retries, and rate-limit backoff
Write README, usage docs, and quickstart
End-to-end tests on sample repos + LLM response fixtures
Publish to PyPI (pip/pipx installable)
Detect unsquashed fixup!/squash! commits and emit warnings
LLM response caching keyed by commit hash
PR description mode (--mode pr)
Custom prompt templates and tone control
Interactive TUI review/edit via textual
CI integration recipes (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI)
Evaluate Rust port for large-repo performance
